007-act-1-scene-1-in-the-forest.title:
Act 1 Scene 1
In the Forest
007-act-1-scene-1-in-the-forest.excerpt: Once upon a time, there lived a Father and his son. One day they were walking together in a forest, picking red cherries. While the son was excitedly picking the cherries and putting them in a bamboo basket, suddenly a green four-legged snake standing on its two legs stood in front of the Father and the son. It then began to speak, "Oh Mighty Father" as he pointed his finger to the son, "This son, AARON K DAVID that you have just created, I bet with you that he will fail you flatly; for he is no better than me. The green serpent then laughed wickedly, "Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha… Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha… Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha" "We shall see", replied THE FATHER who suddenly transformed himself into THE GOLDEN EMPRESS, SHEKINAIH and the conversation ended.

Psa 130:2 THE ADONAI, hear My voice: let thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications. Psa 130:3 If thou, THE YAH, shouldest mark iniquities, O THE ADONAI, who shall stand? Psa 130:4 But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared. Psa 130:5 I wait for THE YAHWEH, my soul doth wait, and in his word do I hope (H3176 "yachal"). Psa 130:6 My soul waiteth for THE ADONAI more than they that watch for the morning: I say, more than they that watch for the morning. Psa 130:7 Let Israel hope (H3176 "yachal") in THE YAHWEH: for with THE YAHWEH there is mercy, and with him is plenteous redemption. Psa 130:8 And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities. JESUS: We have

059-meekness.title: Meekness
059-meekness.excerpt: David: Psa 131:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent) of David. YAHWEH, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty: neither do I exercise myself in great matters, or in things too high for me. Psa 131:2 Surely I have behaved and quieted myself, as a child that is weaned of his mother: my soul is even as a weaned child. Psa 131:3 Let Israel hope in THE YAHWEH from henceforth and for ever. JESUS: These through the tribulations, persecutions and oppressions will be made meek to be part of Heavenly Mount Zion. Have I not spoken, "Blessed are the meek for they shall inherit the earth"? David, can you now read Psalms 132:1-18? David: Psa 132:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent). THE YAHWEH, remember David, and all his humiliation (H6031 "anah"): Psa 132:2 How he sware unto THE YAHWEH, and vowed unto the mighty THE ELOHIM of Jacob; Psa

060-love.title: Love
060-love.excerpt: David: Psa 133:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent) of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity! Psa 133:2 It is like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, even Aaron's beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments; Psa 133:3 As the dew of Hermon, and as the dew that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there THE YAHWEH commanded the blessing, even life for evermore. JESUS: On the day, We shall pour Our blessings through Shekinaih who represents us, THE TRINITY, and she shall pour on you, My Spiritual Aaron, and from you, it shall flow to My elders, and from them, to My body of Anointed Ones which dwell in the bond of love who are fit to be with Me in My Heavenly Mount Zion. To these Brides, they shall

061-chapter-3-the-path-of-the-brides.title:
Chapter 3
THE PATH OF THE BRIDES
061-chapter-3-the-path-of-the-brides.excerpt: David: ABBA FATHER, can you elaborate the five levels the Brides have to ascend? JESUS: The five levels the Brides need to go through are: Peace And Joy Through Tribulation Meekness Of Love Through Persecution Lowliness Of Mind Through Oppression Yieldedness Faith in THE ELOHIM

062-1-peace-and-joy-through-tribulation.title: 1) Peace and Joy through Tribulation
062-1-peace-and-joy-through-tribulation.excerpt: JESUS: The five levels are fruits unto holiness, and the end is everlasting life in Heavenly Mount Zion. Rom 6:22 But now being made free from sin, and become servants to THE ELOHIM, ye have your fruit unto holiness, and the end everlasting life. They are part of the fruits of the Spirit. My Brides must crucify the flesh with the affections and lusts if they are to be accepted by My FATHER to be part of Heavenly Jerusalem in Heavenly Mount Zion to be His children. 2 Co 6:16 And what agreement hath the temple of THE ELOHIM with idols? For ye are the temple of the living ELOHIM; as THE ELOHIM hath said, I will dwell in them, and walk in them; and I will be their ELOHIM, and they shall be my people. 2 Co 6:17 Wherefore come out from among them, and be ye separate, saith

063-a-dream-on-how-to-be-at-peace-and-jo.title: A Dream on How to Be At Peace and Joyful In Tribulations
063-a-dream-on-how-to-be-at-peace-and-jo.excerpt: David: As I was writing the Chapter on Peace and Joy in Tribulation, I was going through many testings of tribulation and chastening of THE FATHER. In one of the nights, I had a prophetic dream. In my dream, one of my disciples had decided to leave me and defected to a lawless minister because of an idol in his heart. Upon hearing the news, I lost my peace and joy. My third sister who was not a believer was present at that time and out of self-righteousness, she was very disgusted with him and was volunteering to send him off quickly. I was comforted and felt vindicated by her. Despite my grief, I decided to send him off myself. All this seemed to happen in our rented one-room-one-hall government subsidized flat where my parents and my nine siblings were staying 52 years ago when I was 6 years old.

064-2-meekness-of-love-through-persecuti.title: 2) Meekness of Love through Persecution
064-2-meekness-of-love-through-persecuti.excerpt: David: ABBA FATHER, what does meekness of love through persecution means? JESUS: In order to reach the top of the Holy Mountain, meekness or gentleness is another requirement that will make one great in holiness so as to reach the Holy Mountain to inherit the Kingdom of Heaven. Psa 18:35 Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation: and thy right hand hath holden me up, and thy gentleness (meekness) hath made me great. I take delight in the meek and will beautify them with the robe of salvation as My heavenly Bride. Psa 149:4 For THE YAHWEH taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation. I give grace to the meek so that they can inherit My glory and the earth. Pro 3:34 Surely he scorneth the scorners: but he giveth grace unto the meek. Pro 3:35 The wise shall inherit glory: but

065-are-the-consolation-of-the-el-small-.title: Are the Consolation of THE EL, Small With Thee?
065-are-the-consolation-of-the-el-small-.excerpt: There was a period where I was going through many persecutions from the leader of a church who was jealous of me because he said I was hyper spiritual, and over self-righteous. I was really hungry for righteousness of THE ELOHIM not knowing that I was asking to be tested and sifted by Satan through the fiery trial of faith. I was persecuted by the leader and the members that believed in his evil speaking, when he spoke against me falsely. Many years ago, I followed this leader with his team to Osaka for ministry. During prayer, I came out for altar call and kneeled before the altar to be ministered by him. During ministry time, he prayed for everyone who responded to his altar call except me. At the end of the meeting, I was the only one left still kneeling and waiting to be ministered by him. He

065-are-the-consolation-of-the-el-small-.excerpt: Eze 1:4 And I looked, and, behold, a whirlwind came out of the north, a great cloud, and a fire infolding itself, and a brightness was about it, and out of the midst thereof as the colour of amber, out of the midst of the fire. Eze 1:5 Also out of the midst thereof came the likeness of four living creatures. And this was their appearance; they had the likeness of a man. Eze 1:6 And every one had four faces, and every one had four wings. Eze 1:7 And their feet were straight feet; and the sole of their feet was like the sole of a calf's foot: and they sparkled like the colour of burnished brass. Eze 1:8 And they had the hands of a man under their wings on their four sides; and they four had their faces and their wings. Eze 1:9 Their wings were joined

066-when-i-said-my-foot-slippeth.title: When I said, my foot slippeth
066-when-i-said-my-foot-slippeth.excerpt: When I said, My foot slippeth; Thy mercy, O YAHWEH, held me up. In the multitude of my thoughts within me Thy comforts delight my soul. (2x) Chorus Are the consolations of THE EL small with thee? Is there any gentle speech with thee? (2x) Psa 94:12 Blessed is the overcomer (H1397 "geber") whom thou chastenest, O JAH, and teachest him out of thy law; Psa 94:13 That thou mayest give him rest from the days of adversity, until the pit be digged for the wicked. Psa 94:14 For THE YAHWEH will not cast off his people, neither will he forsake his inheritance. Psa 94:15 But judgment shall return unto righteousness: and all the upright in heart shall follow it. Psa 94:16 Who will rise up for me against the evildoers? or who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity? Psa 94:17 Unless THE YAHWEH had been

068-vision-of-a-hind.title: Vision of a Hind
068-vision-of-a-hind.excerpt: JESUS: Would you like to share with Shekinaih the vision I gave you regarding the hind that visited Me? David: In my early years seeking THE YAHWEH, persecutions and debasement is a daily training for me to be lowly. Every night I would mourn, sing and meditate on the Book of Psalms and crying out to be comforted. One day, a seer friend of mine while praying for me, saw a vision of me superimposed on a hind walking towards a tent during a still night. As the female deer reached the opening of the tent, Jesus immediately opened the curtain of the tent's entrance and looked into her eyes with loving tenderness. At that moment, the hind stood motionless being completely intoxicated by the divine love and compassion that flowed from Jesus's eyes. She then went into the tent and Jesus closed the curtain. JESUS: Do you know the

069-4-yieldedness.title: 4) Yieldedness
069-4-yieldedness.excerpt: David: ABBA FATHER, please teach me how to yield to you. THE FATHER: Pick up your cross, deny yourself, acknowledge Me in all that you do, be ye lowly just like JESUS; and I will put the spirit of yieldedness in you just like JESUS who yielded unto Me.; even though so unto My representative, Shekinaih. Yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness to enter My Heavenly Mount Zioin. Rom 6:12 Let not sin therefore reign in your mortal body, that ye should obey it in the lusts thereof. Rom 6:13 Neither yield ye your members as instruments of unrighteousness unto sin: but yield yourselves unto THE ELOHIM, as those that are alive from the dead, and your members as instruments of righteousness unto THE ELOHIM. Rom 6:14 For sin shall not have dominion over you: for ye are not under the law, but under grace. Rom 6:15 What

070-5-faith-in-the-elohim.title: 5) Faith In THE ELOHIM
070-5-faith-in-the-elohim.excerpt: David: ABBA FATHER, how can one increase in faith towards you in holiness? JESUS: Blessed are the pure in heart for they shall see THE ELOHIM but the heart is easily polluted and made wicked from all bad communication. So to successfully ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion is not an easy quest. Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted ( H6121 "aqob") above from all things, and made wicked (H605 "anash") : who can know it? There will always be defilement in My potential Brides unless they endeavor to purify their hearts through faith by hearing and obeying My spoken word which are spirit and life to their soul. Act 15:8 And THE ELOHIM, which knoweth the hearts, bare them witness, giving them the Holy Ghost, even as he did unto us; Act 15:9 And put no difference between us and them, purifying their hearts by faith. Rom 10:17 So then

071-unbelief.title: Unbelief
071-unbelief.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, many who have heard our teachings are still struggling in unbelief even though it is true. JESUS: Unbelief is a spirit. Like the dumb spirit that cling to the boy since birth that I cast out, it can aggressively cling to people and refuse to leave unless through prayer and fasting. For those who are struggling in unbelief in receiving and believing in the truth that THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, are teaching, they really need to desperately cry to us to help their unbelief through humbling themselves in prayer and fasting. Mar 9:28 And when he was come into the house, his disciples asked him privately, Why could not we cast him out? Mar 9:29 And he said unto them, This kind

072-chapter-4-the-path-of-the-anointed-o.title:
Chapter 4
The Path of the Anointed Ones
072-chapter-4-the-path-of-the-anointed-o.excerpt: JESUS: David, now I will expound to you the levels of holiness Our Anointed Ones must attain in their progressive ascent unto holiness to Heavenly Mount Zion. David, do you remember what the Seven progressive levels of holiness are? David: They are: Faith Joy Patience Mercy Hope Love Peace

073-1-faith.title: 1) Faith
073-1-faith.excerpt: JESUS: The first thing Our Anointed ones must learn from us is that they need to take the first step of faith and continue in it through much tribulation/troubles My FATHER have scripted for them, and if they be in holiness, shall they enter into the Kingdom of Heaven. Acts 14:22 Confirming the souls of the disciples, and exhorting them to continue in the faith, and that we must through much tribulation enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. It is through the spirit of faith are their hearts purified by faith. Only the holy and pure in heart shall see us in the honour of Our holiness. Matt 5:8 Blessed are those who are pure in heart for they shall see THE ELOHIM. Heb12:14 Pursue (G1377 "diolo") peace amidst (G3326 "meta") all (situation), and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Act 15:8 And THE ELOHIM, which

073-1-faith-p2.title: 1) Faith (part 2)
073-1-faith-p2.excerpt: Rom 4:11 And he received the sign of circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith which he had yet being uncircumcised: that he might be the father of all them that believe, though they be not circumcised; that righteousness might be imputed unto them also: Rom 4:12 And the father of circumcision to them who are not of the circumcision only, but who also walk in the steps of that faith of our father Abraham, which he had being yet uncircumcised. Only those who diligently seek to know My FATHER'S love and have their faith energised by His love will be qualified by both of you to progress to Heavenly Mount Zion. Gal 5:5 For we through the Spirit wait for the hope of righteousness by faith. Gal 5:6 For in JESUS CHRIST neither circumcision availeth anything, nor circumcision; but faith which worketh by love. David, would you

073-1-faith-p3.title: 1) Faith (part 3)
073-1-faith-p3.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, how are your potential Anointed Ones going to increase their faith and keep their hearts pure and holy from being polluted from all things and be not made spiritually sick/ungodly? JESUS: Faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of THE ELOHIM. The word "comes" is a continuous action. Our spirit of faith will continue to energize their hearts if they continue to hear My spoken word through My spokesmen, especially through THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE. Their faith shall grow as they hear and keep it in their hearts. They shall be sanctified and purified if they are doers of what they hear. When I speak through you, your heart would burn and fire would come out of your mouth and

074-2-joy.title: 2) Joy
074-2-joy.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a tap attached to a rock and the tap holder has the word, "Joy" written on it. JESUS: This is the fountain of salvation and without joy, no one shall be able to draw and drink the water that spring up into everlasting life. Isa 12:2 Behold, THE EL is my salvation; I will trust, and not be afraid: for THE YAH YAHWEH is my strength and my song; he also is become my salvation. Isa 12:3 Therefore with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation. In the last days, many false ministers and evil men from all nations from the the elites shall persecute and oppress My potential Anointed Ones but I have sent Shekinaih and you, who represent THE TRINITY, The Angel of Our Presence as My light and truth to lead them to My Heavenly Mount Zion with joy to

075-3-patience.title: 3) Patience
075-3-patience.excerpt: David: ABBA FATHER, how can one cultivate the fruit of spirit of Patience? JESUS: THE FATHER has scripted for Our potential ones all kinds of straitened circumstances for them to produce the Fruit of Patience. When they are financially tight, He will still ask them to give. When they have not much time for themselves, He will still want them to serve others etc... Rom 5:3 And not only so, but we boast in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation accomplisheth patience; Jas1:2 My brethren, count it all joy when ye fall into divers temptations; Jas 1:3 Knowing this, that the trying of your faith accomplisheth patience. THE FATHER will set them up by making them think that their breakthroughs are near to fulfilment and at the same time permit hindrances and delay to try their patience. My potential Anointed Ones must not be disappointed and give up hope as He

076-4-mercy.title: 4) Mercy
076-4-mercy.excerpt: My FATHER is good and His mercy endureth forever. Therefore those who will to ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion to come to His Presence must be merciful. Psa 16:10 For thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; neither wilt thou suffer thine Merciful One (H2623 "chasiyd") to see corruption. Psa 16:11 Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy is fulness of joy; at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore. Our potential Anointed Ones are all vessels of mercy which My FATHER had afore prepared unto glory, therefore, the more they need to show mercy to all as they have obtained mercy from us. Rom 9:22 What if THE ELOHIM, willing to shew his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much longsuffering the vessels of wrath fitted to destruction: Rom 9:23 And that he might make known the riches of his glory

077-5-hope.title: 5) Hope
077-5-hope.excerpt: JESUS: David, you have spoken well. Now I will continue to expound on the Fifth level of holiness called Hope. Our potential Anointed Ones must have hope in the coming resurrection to be clothed with a glorified body of immortality to rule with Me as Christs. I was in Hades for three days and three nights and took the Keys of Death and Hades and came out of it. This will happen again in the last days to our Two Witnesses who are appointed to die for the Name of Christ, as an Anointed one. They shall rest in hope: because We wll not leave their souls in Sheol, neither will We suffer them to see corruption, but will raise them up in the last day through The Angel of Our Presence, SHE (Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT/ HE, Aaron K David representing JESUS). My Name, "JESUS"

078-6-love.title: 6) Love
078-6-love.excerpt: My FATHER is love; and he that continue in love continue in THE FATHER and THE FATHER in him unto eternity. That is why, My potential Anointed Ones must endeavor to increase and abound in love towards another and towards all: to the end that their hearts be stablished, unblameable in holiness before My FATHER. 1Th 3:12 And the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you: 1Th 3:13 To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before THE ELOHIM, even our Father, in The Presence (G3952 "parousia') of our Lord Jesus Christ with all his holy ones. Their love for My FATHER must surpass that of money, father, mother, son, daughter and even themselves. Mat 6:24 No man can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the

079-benefits-of-loving-the-elohim-and-on.title: Benefits of Loving THE ELOHIM and One Another

080-i-the-father-and-jesus-will-love-you.title: i) THE FATHER and JESUS will Love You and Appear to You
080-i-the-father-and-jesus-will-love-you.excerpt: JESUS: When anyone keeps Our commandment to love Our children, My FATHER and I will love him and appear to him. Our children include the ungrateful, unrepentant and the ones who scoff and laugh at you and continue to make use of you. If anyone continues to love them, My FATHER will love him more and pour out more of His love into him so that he can love them on Our behalf. Joh 14:21 He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him. Joh 15:12 This is my commandment, that ye love one another, as I have loved you.

081-ii-the-father-and-jesus-will-dwell-i.title: ii) THE FATHER and JESUS will Dwell in You
081-ii-the-father-and-jesus-will-dwell-i.excerpt: When anyone loves Our children, THE FATHER will love him and He and I will dwell in his heart. When one sow love, he will reap love. My FATHER is love. When He makes His abode in him, His love also dwells in his heart. Joh14:23 JESUS answered and said unto him, if a man loves me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.

082-iii-abide-in-his-love.title: iii) Abide In His Love
082-iii-abide-in-his-love.excerpt: When anyone loves Our children, My love will remain in him. Joh15:9 As the Father hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love. Joh 15:10 If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love.

083-iv-all-things-work-together-for-good.title: iv) All Things Work Together For Good
083-iv-all-things-work-together-for-good.excerpt: If anyone continues to walk in love towards us and Our children, everything will work out good for him. No demon will come near him but will submit to him for they know that he is our favoured one. Rom 8:28 And we know that all things work together for good to them that love THE ELOHIM, to them who are the called according to his purpose.

084-v-given-the-mind-of-a-christ.title: v) Given the Mind of a Christ
084-v-given-the-mind-of-a-christ.excerpt: When anyone loves Our children, We will unite with him and impart Our spiritual understanding to know Our deep things. He shall have the mind of a Christ, an anointed one. 1Co 2:9 But as it is written, Eye hath not seen, nor ear heard, neither have entered into the heart of man, the things which THE ELOHIM hath prepared for them that love him. 1Co 2:10 But THE ELOHIM hath revealed them unto us by his Spirit: for the Spirit searcheth all things, yea, the deep things of THE ELOHIM…..1Co 2:16 For who hath known the mind of THE YAHWEH, that he may instruct him? But we have the mind of a Christ.

085-vi-be-filled-with-the-fullness-of-th.title: vi) Be Filled With the Fullness of THE ELOHIM
085-vi-be-filled-with-the-fullness-of-th.excerpt: When anyone is rooted and grounded in My FATHER'S love, he will be filled with all the fullness of My FATHER. Eph 3:16 That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man; Eph 3:17 That CHRIST may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love, Eph 3:18 May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height; Eph 3:19 And to know the love of CHRIST, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of THE ELOHIM. Eph 3:20 Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,

086-vii-increase-in-holiness.title: vii) Increase in Holiness
086-vii-increase-in-holiness.excerpt: If anyone increases and abound in love towards all, his heart will be unblameable in holiness to stand before My FATHER. 1Th 3:12 And THE YAHWEH make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you: 1Th 3:13 To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before THE ELOHIM, even our Father, in The Presence (G3952 "parousia") of our YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST with all his saints.

087-viii-receive-the-crown-of-life.title: viii) Receive the Crown of Life
087-viii-receive-the-crown-of-life.excerpt: If anyone loves us and has passed Our tests, he will receive the crown of life, which We have promised. Jas1:12 Blessed is the man: for when he is tried, he shall receive the crown of life, which THE YAHWEH hath promised to them that love him.

088-ix-his-soul-shall-be-purified.title: ix) His Soul shall be Purified
088-ix-his-soul-shall-be-purified.excerpt: The word "fervently" G1619 "ektenos" means intently. Anyone who intently loves My children in sincerity regardless of how he feel for that person, have laboured to love and will have his soul purified by us. 1Pe1:22 Seeing ye have purified your souls in obeying the truth through the Spirit unto unfeigned love of the brethren, see that ye love one another with a pure heart fervently.

089-x-his-love-is-perfected-in-us.title: x) His Love is Perfected in Us
089-x-his-love-is-perfected-in-us.excerpt: If anyone continues to love Our children, My FATHER will continue to dwell in him and His love will be perfected in him. 1Jn 4:12 No man hath seen at any time. If we love one another, THE ELOHIM dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us.

090-7-peace.title: 7) Peace
090-7-peace.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, what does the bible mean by 'follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see You?' JESUS: In all the tribulations that My FATHER puts anyone through, he needs to be at peace and not to be defiled by demons of unbelief, bitterness, anger, sorrow and etc.. The word "World" according to Strong's Number G2889 "kosmos" means "System, the orderly way things are being run". I have overcome this present age system (which is the Babylonian system). This is the peace that I talked about. In this Cosmos, Our potential Anointed Ones must produce and maintain this peace which is unto holiness. If he does not have this kind of peace, he will be defiled by demons of unbelief, fear, doubts or many others. I came to preach peace in THE FATHER through the tribulations He has permitted for them to be tested

090-7-peace-p2.title: 7) Peace (part 2)
090-7-peace-p2.excerpt: We heard their complaints but bore with them and opened the Red Sea. Yet when We tested them again on food and drink, they grumbled again in bitterness and unbelief, challenging Moses and questioning Our trustworthiness and faithfulness. Exo 15:22 So Moses brought Israel from the Red sea, and they went out into the wilderness of Shur; and they went three days in the wilderness, and found no water. Exo 15:23 And when they came to Marah, they could not drink of the waters of Marah, for they were bitter: therefore the name of it was called Marah. Exo 15:24 And the people murmured against Moses, saying, What shall we drink? Exo 16:2 And the whole congregation of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and Aaron in the wilderness: Exo 16:3 And the children of Israel said unto them, Would to THE ELOHIM we had died by the hand

090-7-peace-p3.title: 7) Peace (part 3)
090-7-peace-p3.excerpt: Heb 4:1 Let us therefore fear, lest, a promise being left us of entering into his rest, any of you should seem to come short of it. Heb 4:2 For unto us was the gospel preached, as well as unto them: but the word preached did not profit them, not being mixed with faith in them that heard it. Heb 4:3 For we which have believed do enter into rest, as he said, As I have sworn in my wrath, if they shall enter into my rest: although the works were finished from the foundation of the world. Heb 4:4 For he spake in a certain place of the seventh day on this wise, And THE ELOHIM did rest the seventh day from all his works. Heb 4:5 And in this place again, If they shall enter into my rest. Heb 4:6 Seeing therefore it remaineth that some must enter

092-act-2-scene-3-the-great-offence-of-t.title:
Act 2 Scene 3 
The Great Offence of THE TRINITY
092-act-2-scene-3-the-great-offence-of-t.excerpt: Time Frame: When you least expected Location: Everywhere Lo! And Behold! A man with a giant drill was drilling a hole on the road when the giant bit hit an underground gas pipe causing a gas leakage which kindled an explosion which cause the earth to crack and some part of the road to sink in due to a weakened foundation. Meanwhile, a truck driver was driving by listening to music on his ear piece who suddenly notice the sink hole could not stopped in time and immediately the truck fell into the sunken hole of the road, with half of the truck body hanging over the crack hole. In panic, he quickly opened the driver's door and jumped out of the truck and stood on the side of the sunken roadside, and as soon a he jumped out of the truck, the truck plunged headlong into the deep hole

093-chapter-1-the-messenger-of-the-yahwe.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, going back to Shekinaih's vision; after the Brides and the Anointed Ones have reached the top of the mountain, there is an open field spread with broken glass and the Brides were crawling over it and the Anointed Ones were rolling over it. There will be further tribulation and persecution for those who continue to hear and receive the oracle from the Messenger of THE YAHWEH. Mat 13:20 But he that received the seed into stony places, the same is he that heareth the oracle (G3056 "logos" speech including the thought), and anon with joy receiveth it; Mat 13:21 Yet hath he not root in himself, but dureth for a while: for when tribulation or persecution ariseth because of the oracle (G3056 "logos"), by and by he is offended. This is

Shekinaih and you, who represent THE TRINITY, Our strong hand and consecrated one, representing Our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE EL", are appointed unto them which are disobedient, a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offence. 095-captive.title: Captive
095-captive.excerpt: The people of this age are unaware that they are actually captives to the Diabolos. In one way or the other, they are snared by him and are at his mercy. 2Ti 2:24 And the servant of THE YAHWEH must not strive; but be gentle unto all men, apt to teach, patient, 2Ti 2:25 In meekness instructing those that oppose themselves; if THE ELOHIM peradventure will give them repentance to the acknowledging of the truth; 2Ti 2:26 And that they may recover themselves out of the snare of the Diabolos/Accuser, who are taken captive (G2221 "zogreo" capture alive) by him at his will. Like the silly women laden with sins mentioned in 2 Timothy 3:6, many of Our children are led captive by his spirit of Lusts. 2Ti 3:6 For of this sort are they which creep into houses, and lead captive silly women laden with sins, led away with

095-captive-p2.title: Captive (part 2)
095-captive-p2.excerpt: Psalms 69 vividly describes the tribulations that Our last days' Shoshannim/Lilies Brides have to go through as Our prisoners as they follow both of you. The Diabolos will hate them without a cause and persecute them wrongfully through the waters of different races of nations (Rev 12:15 Rev 17:15). They will be charged of stealing and have to restore that which they have not taken. They will be insulted and shamed and their siblings will break their ties of relation with them for fear of troubles. Their hearts will be broken by shame and they will find no comforters in depression. In the tribulations, both of you who bears Our Names will be their deliverer and set them on high from their persecutors. Out of gratefulness, they will praise and magnify both of you with thanksgiving. We, THE YAHWEH shall hears the lowly and despises not Our prisoners; We will

097-jesus-as-an-offence.title: JESUS as an Offence
097-jesus-as-an-offence.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, the word "offence" G4624 "skandalizo" according to Thayer Definition is: 1.To put stumbling block or impediment in the way, upon which another may trip and fall, metaphorically to offend 2. To seduce or entice them to sin, to miss the mark; and 3. To cause a person to begin to distrust and desert one whom he ought to trust and obey. Why do you affirmed that it is necessary for offences to come? JESUS: We use offences to offend one's mind in order to expose what lies beneath one's heart. This is Our mirror to let one realise what lies within his/her heart. One need to acknowledge what lies within oneself and repents and cries towards us (Shekinaih and Aaron K David representing us) if one wants to be delivered from this stronghold thoroughly. I always speak in parables regarding the Kingdom of Heaven like "Whosoever eat

098-offences-through-teachings.title: Offences through Teachings
098-offences-through-teachings.excerpt: Our last days' teachings through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall cause a lot of offences to many people in Christendom. According to traditional teachings, The Messiah (Saviour) that is to come in the last days is one person. But it is prophesied in the Book of Obadiah, in the last days there will be many. Oba 1:21 And saviours shall come up on mount Zion to judge the mount of Esau; and the kingdom shall be THE YAHWEH'S. The deliverers from Obadiah are also referred to as the Gentiles which are from Heavenly Zion mentioned in Romans 11:25-26. They will be sent to turn away ungodliness from Israel in the flesh. As We have saith

099-offence-through-tribulations-and-per.excerpt: After one has received the true Gospel of the Kingdom, My FATHER will permit tribulations and persecutions to come to him in order for you to bear the fruit of the Spirit. There will be many offences especially in the last days. Many who do not know the Seven Offences of THE ADONAI will be offended and fall away. Mat 13:20 But he that received the seed into stony places, the same is he that heareth the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) , and anon with joy receiveth it; Mat 13:21 Yet hath he not root in himself, but dureth for a while: for when tribulation or persecution ariseth because of the oracle, by and by he is offended. These are the people who do not know Our ways of peace and Our offences. My FATHER will continue to offend them with unreasonable demands. He will continue

100-how-not-to-be-offended.title: How Not to Be Offended
100-how-not-to-be-offended.excerpt: Psa 119:164 Seven times a day do I praise thee because of thy righteous judgments. Psa 119:165 Great peace has they which love thy law: and nothing shall offend them. Psa 119:166 THE YAHWEH, I have hoped for thy salvation, and done thy commandments Step 1: Every time when you feel offended, remind yourself that you must keep your peace and not to be stirred up in anger so that you will not give a place to the accuser to cause you to evil speak and sin. Always praise THE FATHER and remind yourself that His Name, THE YAHWEH, is merciful, righteous and just, and He is using offences to test you in order to promote you. Therefore, you ought to be thankful to Him for giving you the opportunity to produce the fruit of the Spirit. Step 2: Always remind yourself to be grateful and love and treasure the

101-the-seven-squeezes-of-the-adonai-the.title:
The Seven Squeezes of THE ADONAI 
The ADONAI's TestS
101-the-seven-squeezes-of-the-adonai-the.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, can you expound to me the seven offences of Their Name, THE ADONAI? JESUS: The offences of THE FATHER through The Name, THE ADONAI, come in seven areas: 1) Financial squeeze 2) Physical squeeze 3) Mental squeeze 4) Emotional squeeze 5) Ridiculous/Absurd squeeze 6) Impossible logic/Rational squeeze 7) Completely out of this world squeeze

102-1-financial-squeeze.title: 1) Financial Squeeze
102-1-financial-squeeze.excerpt: During a famine, My FATHER, through His Name, THE ADONAI, through Elijah financially squeezed a widow woman of Zarephath of her only morsel of bread that she planned to eat with her child before they starve to death. Because she trusted in Elijah even though he was a stranger, THE ADONAI overturned her dire situation and provided her and her child with food throughout the three years of famine by multiplying her flour and oil. Many of Our children have been squeezed financially in their tithes and offerings by THE FATHER, but as they obey, We will see them through. THE FATHER usually increases their income so that they did not actually feel the squeeze at all, though they felt straitened in the beginning. Indeed, THE FATHER is faithful, and will not suffer them to be tempted above that they are able to bear; but will with the testing also

103-2-physical-squeeze.title: 2) Physical Squeeze
103-2-physical-squeeze.excerpt: Elijah was squeezed by us physically when he was asked to ascend to Horeb, the mount of THE ELOHIM, after taking his last meal. The journey took him 40 days. 1Ki 19:1 And Ahab told Jezebel all that Elijah had done, and withal how he had slain all the prophets with the sword. 1Ki 19:2 Then Jezebel sent a messenger unto Elijah, saying, So let the gods do to me, and more also, if I make not thy life as the life of one of them by tomorrow about this time. 1Ki 19:3 And when he saw that, he arose, and went for his life, and came to Beersheba, which belongeth to Judah, and left his servant there. 1Ki 19:4 But he himself went a day's journey into the wilderness, and came and sat down under a juniper tree: and he requested for himself that he might die; and said,

104-3-mental-squeeze.title: 3) Mental Squeeze
104-3-mental-squeeze.excerpt: JESUS: Bravo! Bravo! Bravo!, you have crossed the Red Sea of impossiblilities and have come forth as gold. What you go through, others have to follow your footsteps. (JESUS patted on David's shoulder and then put His arm around his shoulder. JESUS then continued expounding.) Ezekiel was mentally squeezed by us when he was asked to eat bread that was made from a mixture of wheat, beans, lentils, millet and fitches mixed with cow's dung. He was to eat by weight 226 grams a day for 390 days and drink water by measure. At first, he was asked to mix them with human's dung but upon his protest, we substituted it with cow's dung. This was to signify that the Children of Israel shall eat their defiled bread among the Gentiles where they were driven. They shall eat bread by weight, and with care; and they shall drink water by

105-4-emotional-squeeze.title: 4) Emotional Squeeze
105-4-emotional-squeeze.excerpt: Jonah was emotionally squeezed by us when he was commanded to go to Nineveh to cry against it for their wickedness and warn them of Our coming judgment. But Jonah fled to Tarshish from the Angel of Our Presence, SHE, Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT/ HE, Aaron K David representing JESUS, because he knew that We will change Our mind (relented) when the people repented and this will make him look bad that Our words dropped from his mouth. After being thrown into the sea and swallowed by a big fish, he repented and renewed his vow to keep the peace and obey us, THE YAHWEH, through The Angel of Our Presence. Jon 2:9 But I will sacrifice unto thee with the voice of thanksgiving; I will be at peace (H7999 "shalam") that that I have vowed. Salvation is of THE YAHWEH. Jon 2:10 And THE YAHWEH

106-5-ridiculous-squeeze.title: 5) Ridiculous Squeeze
106-5-ridiculous-squeeze.excerpt: JESUS: Peter and the disciples were ridiculously squeezed by us and had forsaken all to follow Me. After hearing that it is impossible for someone who trusts in riches to enter into the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM, they said among themselves in their astonishment: "Who then can be saved?" This is what all My true disciples will experience when they decide to follow Me. They will all be squeezed ridiculously like: forsaking their house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands for My sake and for the Gospel's sake even to the extent of forsaking their life. Mar 10:23 And JESUS looked round about, and saith unto his disciples, How hardly shall they that have riches enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But JESUS answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how

107-6-impossible-squeeze.title: 6) Impossible Squeeze
107-6-impossible-squeeze.excerpt: On one occasion, My disciples felt Our impossible squeeze when I asked them to give food to more than five thousand men who were following Me in the desert with no access to food except five loaves and two fishes. In the beginning, they were offended and felt that it was an illogical and impossible task for them to do. But soon, they learned to pull down their stronghold of rational thinking and of the wisdom they learned from men, which is from the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil, and to submit and obey what was commanded of them after they have been taught of Our Way that all things are possible with THE ELOHIM to those who believe. (Luk 9:11-17)

108-7-completely-out-of-this-world-squee.title: 7) Completely Out Of This World Squeeze
108-7-completely-out-of-this-world-squee.excerpt: Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego were squeezed by us with squeezes that were completely out of this world when they were cast into the midst of the burning furnace that was heated seven times hotter than usual because they fell down not on the floor to worship the golden image that Nebuchadnezzar the King erected when the sound of the cornet, flute, harp, sackbut, psaltery, and dulcimer, and all kinds of music were sounded. But after approving their faith, We sent an angel to protect them so that the fire had no power upon their bodies, nor was a hair of their head singed, neither were their coats changed, nor the smell of fire had passed on them. (Dan 3:1-30) Daniel was also squeezed by THE ADONAI with squeezes that were completely out of this world when he was thrown into the lion's den for not obeying the decree of King

109-the-squeeze-of-the-adonai-on-abraham.title: The Squeeze of THE ADONAI on Abraham
109-the-squeeze-of-the-adonai-on-abraham.excerpt: David: THE FATHER through His Name, THE ADONAI, squeezed Abraham through ten tests at certain appointed time of his life. This is known as the Ten Trials of Abraham. He was squeezed financially, physically, mentally, emotionally and ridiculously when he was commanded to leave his comfort zone in the land of Chaldea for a strange land where He will make him a great nation. This sounds absurd to most of us and is definitely not practical and economical. Abraham must have had a hard time convincing his wife and Lot to follow him (Gen 12:1). Upon arriving in Canaan, THE ADONAI again squeezed Abraham physically, mentally and emotionally by bringing a famine in the land. At that time, those who followed him, including Sarah and Lot, must have struggled much to believe Abraham whether he had really heard from THE ELOHIM. Abraham must be very stressed and perplexed about the

110-k-david-s-testimony-regarding-the-7-.title: K.DAVID'S Testimony Regarding the 7 Squeezes of THE FATHER
110-k-david-s-testimony-regarding-the-7-.excerpt: David: Twenty years ago, I owned a real estate company and was doing well. I was living in my newly renovated three storey corner terrace and driving a Mercedes 280 SE sedan. Spiritually, I was backslidden but THE YAHWEH had not given me up. One day, while driving to Johore Bahru for shopping, I heard a still small voice speaking to me asking me whether I was happy. My spirit responded to the voice and replied, "Why not?" I was doing well financially, happily married with a beautiful wife and had 3 beautiful and lovely children. I was enjoying life every day with no worry of lack. The voice replied saying, "Be truthful, are you really happy?" Immediately, it seemed that some video clips of moments of my unhappiness started to play in my mind especially of my daily encounters with people whom I knew that were jealous of my

110-k-david-s-testimony-regarding-the-7-.title: K.DAVID'S Testimony Regarding the 7 Squeezes of THE FATHER (part 2)
110-k-david-s-testimony-regarding-the-7-.excerpt: I began to lose my self-respect and I thought many times of giving up serving THE YAHWEH and going back to my real estate business to provide for my loved ones, but each time when I inquired of THE YAHWEH to ask for His permission, He would comfort me and assure me that I was still in His will and He needed to squeeze me further financially, physically, mentally, emotionally, ridiculously, and illogically, and asked me to do and trust the things that were out of this world as revealed to me. The Father would comfort me by moving the hearts of many Christian brothers and sisters who gave me the tithes or offerings as unto THE YAHWEH. This went on for 10 years and so our basic needs were met. What I did was not acceptable by many in Christendom or among the people I knew because of the

111-reasons-for-the-squeeze.title: Reasons for the Squeeze
111-reasons-for-the-squeeze.excerpt: Through all these squeezes, I have learned that all things are possible to those who believe in THE FATHER. They are but means to the end which is to obtain the Kingdom. After being squeezed financially, I have learned to trust in THE FATHER for my provision and would no more put my trust in earthly riches. Riches have lost its hold on me and I am no more choked by the deceitfulness of riches. Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But JESUS answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how hard is it for them that trust in riches to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! After being squeezed physically through fastings, I am able to have self-control over the flesh with its affections and lusts. I can keep my body under subjection and I am able to fast when required by THE YAHWEH

ACT 2 Scene 4 
Submit to THE TRINITY
112-act-2-scene-4-submit-to-the-trinity.excerpt: Time Frame: Daily Event Location: Worldwide On a bright, hot, sunny noon day, many UFOs were spotted hovering above tall buildings worldwide radiating piercing light into these tall buildings causing them to explode into fire subsequently. Panic crowds were screaming as they ran in every directions to search for safe places to hide for their safety. Many helicopters hovering above these tall buildings were announcing with loud speakers calling for full evacuation of these buildings as they broadcasted these warnings in the air, "We are under attack by aliens." Government Agencies worldwide were summoning their military forces to bring these UFOs down. Meanwhile, Shekinaih seated in her Heavenly Throne, with David standing as her scribe were watching all these happenings. Suddenly, Satan with his evil host came and stood at Shekinaih's right hand seeking for permission to completely destroy the land that are full of wickedness and have willingly surrendered

Chapter 3 
Submit to THE ELOHIM and Resist the Accuser
113-chapter-3-submit-to-the-elohim-and-r.excerpt: JESUS: Reveal to My brothers/sisters that they will also be given this authority and power if they have submitted to THE FATHER and resisted the Accuser and successfully ascended to My Heavenly Mount Zion to be My archangels. The whole purpose of My potential Brides and Anointed Ones ascending to the Holy Mountain is to be restored back to the image of THE ELOHIM, in Adamic glory before the fall, and to take back the dominion of the Cosmos from the Diabolos which was surrendered to him by Adam. Luk 4:5 And the Diabolos, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time. Luk 4:6 And the Diabolos said unto him, All this authority will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is surrendered (G3860 "paradidomi") unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give

114-vision-of-a-baby-in-a-mortar.title: Vision of A Baby in A Mortar
114-vision-of-a-baby-in-a-mortar.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a vision of THE FATHER placed a baby inside a granite mortar and pounded it with a pestle to crush it. He poured the blood that came out inside a test-tube with the word "Character" written on it and pasted the pounded meat paste with the word "the will of man" written on it from the crown on the head to the sole of the feet of JESUS who was hung on a cross. Next, the light of JESUS went into the human form meat paste and the form became a living light being that had a face of a baby with blue eyes. David: ABBA FATHER, what is the interpretation of this vision? THE FATHER: Every babe and suckling that is ordained to be crowned with glory and honour to silence the enemy and the avenger (Psa 8:1-9) must be crushed of his self-will to submit

115-vision-of-the-brides-and-anointed-on.title: Vision of the Brides and Anointed Ones Surfing
115-vision-of-the-brides-and-anointed-on.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a vision of the Brides and Anointed Ones surfing on the waves of a sea filled with snakes which would turn into a lake of fire if their eyes do not focus on JESUS, THE WORD, but on the negative circumstances that they have encountered. They will then lose their balance and be swallowed up by Gehenna fire. David: ABBA FATHER, what is the meaning of this vision? JESUS: The waves of the sea signify the tumultuous people of the AntiChrist, who is signified by the dragon Rahab, the proud. Psa 65:7 Which stilleth the noise of the seas, the noise of their waves, and the tumult of the people. Job 38:11 And said, Hitherto shalt thou come, but no further: and here shall thy proud waves be stayed? Psa 89:9 Thou rulest the raging of the sea: when the waves thereof arise, thou stillest them. Psa

116-vision-of-a-foot-stepping-on-broken-.title: Vision of a foot Stepping on Broken Glass
116-vision-of-a-foot-stepping-on-broken-.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a foot stepping on broken glass. JESUS: Those who follow Me will have to walk the path that is full of persecution. Broken glass symbolizes persecution. I will use persecution to test them whether they will still deny themselves and not vindicate themselves in their pride, ego and self-righteousness or not.

117-vision-of-a-foot-stepping-on-nails.title: Vision of a Foot Stepping on Nails
117-vision-of-a-foot-stepping-on-nails.excerpt: Shekinaih: Now I see a foot stepping on protruding and piercing nails. JESUS: The nails signify oppression. We will use oppression in the form of reproach, mocking, ridicule, or scoffing to break their hearts to prove their faithfulness whether they will still remain with Me and submit to My discipline of perfection through suffering or not. Mat 5:10 Blessed are they which are persecuted for righteousness' sake: for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven. Mat 5:11 Blessed are ye, when men shall revile you, and persecute you, and shall say all manner of evil against you falsely, for my sake. Mat 5:12 Rejoice, and be exceeding glad: for great is your reward in heaven: for so persecuted they the prophets which were before you.

118-vision-of-the-selection-of-those-who.title:
Vision of the Selection of those
 who are called to be an Anointed ONE
118-vision-of-the-selection-of-those-who.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a vision of a sewage tunnel with a very narrow edge. I see five men walking concurrently along the narrow edge of a tunnel allotted to each. As they walked, shit were thrown at them. If they slipped and fell on the slimly surface below them, it will be very difficult to continue to reach their destination. JESUS: These five men walking on the edge are called to be second in command in My army and were called at the same time. As they walked with hope to fulfil their destiny, My FATHER will permit the Diabolos to test them through people that are influenced by demons. The shit that the demons were throwing at them represent: The rejection that they received from others; They being treated as filth; They being pressed down by lawless ministers who were once anointed like King Saul but were rejected by

119-vision-of-satan-tempting-with-a-beau.title: Vision of Satan Tempting with a Beautiful Woman
119-vision-of-satan-tempting-with-a-beau.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see Satan tempting another man through the lusts of the flesh and lusts of the eyes. He placed before him a woman of exceeding beauty, and comeliness, and of subtle wit, and of a ready and understanding composure. She looked very attractive like a Chinese fairy in the movies, but inside her was a witch sent to cause his downfall. I saw Satan then whispered to him and said: "Take her as you will for her desire is unto you, and you shall have love, happiness and comfort all your life, and see your children's children. Yea, is it not written, It is not good for man that he should be alone?" I then saw the man stretched out his right hand to the woman and said: "Come my love!" She reciprocated and placed her hand on his hand and they entered by a door into a room

119-vision-of-satan-tempting-with-a-beau.title: Vision of Satan Tempting with a Beautiful Woman (part 2)
119-vision-of-satan-tempting-with-a-beau.excerpt: (THE HOLY SPIRIT on his left and THE FATHER on his right, nodded their heads in unision fully agreed with what JESUS had just spoken. JESUS then continued to speak.) You overcame them by always listening to Our word on your headphone. As you do it, you are increasing in faith as Our word cleanses you. You also listened to Our prophetic words which you had recorded and received from Our true prophets in your early years and from Shekinaih in the later years. As you continued to let Our prophetic words wash and renovate your mind, you are encouraging yourself every time you are discouraged. You have also learned to avoid profane and fruitless discussions with the ungodly intellects so that you will be not defiled by their ungodliness. 2Ti 2:14 Of these things put them in remembrance, charging them before THE YAHWEH that they strive not about words

120-vision-of-k-david-kneeling-before-th.title: Vision of K.DAVID Kneeling before THE FATHER in Shekinaih and Being Crowned
120-vision-of-k-david-kneeling-before-th.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see you kneeling down before me who is inside THE FATHER. I recommended you for promotion. JESUS then endorsed my recommendation and gave you the title "King of kings" and "Lord of lords". He also gave me a golden robe, a scepter, a pair of shoes, and a belt to represent Him. JESUS: When you are promoted by THE FATHER through Shekinaih, there will be many offers coming to you concurrently offering to promote you. I will do many miracles through you. Many dead will be raised and many who are sick and diseased will be healed through your hand as we have revealed to you through many visions and dreams by My prophets in the past and even now so through Shekinaih.

121-vision-of-a-contract.title: Vision of a Contract
121-vision-of-a-contract.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see JESUS pass a contract to me with the words, "David's Book" written on it. He then said to me : "THE FATHER has given you equal rights and participation regarding David. Whatever THE FATHER intends to do to him, you also has a say in it." JESUS: David, you must fear THE FATHER always. Submit to His representative Shekinaih whom THE FATHER has placed above you and your throne will be secured. There will come a time, when your fame is so great, that you feel you do not need to consult THE FATHER through her anymore, because you think you can hear directly from Me yourself; that moment will be the beginning of your downfall. Shekinaih: I see a vision of you falling headlong from a cliff, and your head and bones were cracked, and you are bleeding. I then heard THE FATHER says to you,

122-vision-of-k-david-walking-on-a-tight.title: Vision of K.DAVID Walking on a Tight Rope
122-vision-of-k-david-walking-on-a-tight.excerpt: In another vision, I saw THE FATHER in me was using my hand to support your hand as you climbed upward on a tight rope from a lower point to a higher point for every new breakthrough. After you have made it, THE TRINITY will use both our hands to support and help the rest of the army to obtain their every breakthrough. JESUS: Warn My potential Brides/ Anointed Ones to guard their heart for it is easily polluted to supplant by force or treachery and made wicked, who can know? Therefore, whosoever My FATHER has put them under (especially Shekinaih and Aaron K David who represent us), they are to be faithful and sincere towards them as unto us for we will search their hearts and try their thoughts and rewards them according to their ways, and according to the fruit of their doings. As long as there is

123-vision-of-how-the-diabolos-enters-a-.title: Vision of How the Diabolos Enters a Person through His Evil Spirits
123-vision-of-how-the-diabolos-enters-a-.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a vision of how the Diabolos enters a person through evil spirits. Firstly, I saw the Diabolos/Accuser through his evil spirit in a form of a snake first whispers lies into a person's ear. If the person agrees with it, the authority or power that he received from THE YAHWEH over the evil spirit will leave him and return to us, and the snake will go inside him and energizes him. The person will become a captive and a host of the snake. He will feel the feeling of the snake. This snake can be the evil spirit of lust, bitterness, unbelief, jealousy and etc. If the person sincerely repents and asks my FATHER for forgiveness for agreeing with the snake and permitting it to enter him and control him at its will, after he had chose to submit to us through our representatives, the authority and

124-how-we-can-submit-to-the-elohim.title: How we CAN submit to THE ELOHIM?

125-1-mind-the-things-of-the-spirit.title: 1) Mind the Things of the Spirit
125-1-mind-the-things-of-the-spirit.excerpt: JESUS: As long as you walk in the flesh, you will be condemned by the Diabolos because the flesh delights in the lusts of the eyes, the lusts of the flesh and the pride of life, and is hostile against Our Law. Because of this, those who are in the flesh will neither be able to submit to THE FATHER nor please him. You must endeavor to mind the things of the spirit and not set your mind on transient things which will pass away with the Cosmos. Rom 8:1 There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in CHRIST JESUS, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:2 For the law of the Spirit of life in CHRIST JESUS hath made me free from the law of sin and death. Rom 8:3 For what the law could not do, in that it was

126-2-stop-standing-in-your-own-righteou.title: 2) Stop Standing in YOur Own Righteousness
126-2-stop-standing-in-your-own-righteou.excerpt: You can never appear righteous before THE FATHER through the flesh. This righteousness of the law is fulfilled through you believing, obeying, and submitting to the command of THE FATHER through Faith (PISTIS/ THE HOLY SPIRIT) in walking according to the Way of THE FATHER which will lead to your salvation. Only those who believe that I was raised from the dead through THE HOLY SPIRIT PISTIS, the Angel of Our Presence, SHE/HE (Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT/ He, Aaron K David representing JESUS) and submit to them who come in Our Name shall be restored to their pre-Adamic state. Rom 10:3 For they being ignorant of THE ELOHIM's righteousness, and going about to establish their own righteousness, have not submitted themselves unto the righteousness of THE ELOHIM. Rom 10:4 For CHRIST is the end of the law for righteousness to everyone that believeth. Rom 10:5 For

127-3-submit-to-the-higher-authorities.title: 3) Submit To the Higher Authorities
127-3-submit-to-the-higher-authorities.excerpt: All authorities are ordained by THE FATHER. They are His ministers. Whether they are just or unjust, one is to submit to them as unto THE FATHER for conscience's sake. If anyone resist them, he shall fall into condemnation from the Diabolos as these authorities have the authority to punish any who break the law. Rom 13:1 Let every soul be submit (G5293 "hupotasso") unto the higher authorities. For there is no authority but of THE ELOHIM: the authorities that be are ordained of THE ELOHIM. Rom 13:2 Whosoever therefore resisteth the authority, resisteth the ordinance of THE ELOHIM: and they that resist shall receive to themselves damnation. Everyone ought to be mindful not only to submit to them but also to obey and be peaceable, gentle and meek towards them and not evil speak against them. David, would you like to share with Shekinaih your conviction through THE HOLY

128-4-submit-to-the-chastening-of-the-fa.title: 4) Submit To the Chastening of THE FATHER
128-4-submit-to-the-chastening-of-the-fa.excerpt: To submit to THE FATHER is to submit to His discipline. THE FATHER has orchestrated many tribulations, persecutions and oppressions in the path of those whom He have called to give them many opportunities to bear the Fruits of the Spirit of Holiness in order for them to partake of His holiness. The flesh will always protest and at times, due to being overwhelmed with grief, some will lose their peace and become discouraged and defiled by the spirit of bitterness and rebellion, thus giving an occasion for the Diabolos to condemn them as well as to disqualify them from going to Mount Zion and unto the Heavenly Jerusalem. Therefore, serve THE FATHER acceptably with reverence and godly fear through submitting to His chastening. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather submit (GG5293 "hupotasso")

129-resist-the-diabolos.title: Resist the Diabolos
129-resist-the-diabolos.excerpt: David: ABBA FATHER, how can one resist the Diabolos/Accuser? JESUS: Before one learn how to resist the Diabolos, We must know who he is and his methods of deception against those whom We called into glory The word "Diabolos" means the Accuser or Defamer. He is ordained by THE FATHER to be a tester for all who are called to glory. I am the leader and completer of the obedience of faith in the testing of THE FATHER. During the tests, the Diabolos accused Me every time that I was not worthy to be the Son of THE ELOHIM and tried to snare and provoke Me to miss the mark/sin. Firstly, he tested Me in the lust of the flesh by asking Me to command the stone to turn into bread. Secondly, he tried to snare Me in the pride of life by offering Me the kingdoms of the world.

129-resist-the-diabolos-p2.title: Resist the Diabolos (part 2)
129-resist-the-diabolos-p2.excerpt: Shekinaih: I see a vision of Molech throwing playing cards on each person whom he chose to test and see who will take the bait. Those who took his bait were usually novices who had been lifted up with pride. He would then possessed and took them under his captivity to use them as his hosts to oppose those whom THE FATHER wants to use. JESUS: Yes, the Diabolos likes to snare Our children by giving them occasions to puff up and later accuse and condemn them of their pride before us, knowing that My FATHER resists the proud but gives grace to the humble. 1 Ti 3:6 Not a novice, lest being lifted up with pride he fall into the condemnation of the Diabolos. 1 Ti 3:7 Moreover he must have a good report of them which are without; lest he fall into reproach and the snare of the

129-resist-the-diabolos-p3.title: Resist the Diabolos (part 3)
129-resist-the-diabolos-p3.excerpt: After they have overcome the Accuser by coming out of the tribulation, they will be restored to be the morning stars, and they shall rule the nations with a rod of iron and break them to shivers as the vessels of a potter. Rev 2:26 And he that overcometh, and keepeth my works unto the end, to him will I give power over the nations: Rev 2:27 And he shall rule them with a rod of iron; as the vessels of a potter shall they be broken to shivers: even as I received of my Father. Rev 2:28 And I will give him the morning star. 131-1-resist-not-evil-with-evil-but-show.title: 1) Resist not Evil WITH EVIL but show Mercy
131-1-resist-not-evil-with-evil-but-show.excerpt: Part of the purpose for Our potential Brides/ Anointed Ones in ascending the Holy Mountain is to bear the Fruit of Mercy of Holiness. Thus, it is important that they do not resist evil with evil but to show mercy to those who smite them unreasonably, sue them wrongly, take away their coat by fraud, or compel them to walk a mile unjustly. They should instead love those who hate them, bless those who curse them, and pray for those who mock them. At the beginning of Our training in mercy, this persecution can come from people whom THE FATHER will harden and stir up for their training. These people can be their siblings, relatives, friends, pastors, church members, etc. At present, most people who are called are under this level of persecution, but they have already been defiled by bitterness and unforgiveness and have been swallowed up and disabled

132-2-do-not-premeditate-what-to-speak-w.title: 2) Do not Premeditate what to Speak when Accused
132-2-do-not-premeditate-what-to-speak-w.excerpt: In the last days under the Antichrist's reign, many will be falsely accused of crime before kings and rulers and will be charged in court and sent to prisons for My Name's sake. You are to settle in your hearts once and for all not to defend yourselves in the flesh (as these will come to nothing) but to wait for THE HOLY SPIRIT to give you a mouth and wisdom to speak to your adversaries that they shall not be able to gainsay nor resist. Luk 21:12 But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name's sake. Luk 21:13 And it shall turn to you for a testimony. Luk 21:14 Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer: Luk 21:15

133-3-resist-not-the-authorities-even-if.title: 3) Resist Not the Authorities Even If They Are Unjust
133-3-resist-not-the-authorities-even-if.excerpt: At present, the Diabolos is in control of this present evil age. His children are the principalities, authorities, and rulers of darkness of this age ruling most of the nations. The Diabolos and his children have the law on their side, for the rules and regulations of the law were drafted according to their advantage. Therefore, ye are not to resist them as he and his children were ordained by THE FATHER to rule this age; for Adam had surrendered the kingdoms to him. Rom 13:1 Let every soul be subject unto the higher authorities. For there is no authority but of THE ELOHIM: the authorities that be are ordained of THE ELOHIM. Rom 13:2 Whosoever therefore resisteth the authority, resisteth the ordinance of THE ELOHIM: and they that resist shall receive to themselves damnation. Luk 4:5 And the Diabolos, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him

134-4-resist-the-diabolos-by-continuing-.title: 4) Resist the Diabolos by Continuing to Humble Ourselves
134-4-resist-the-diabolos-by-continuing-.excerpt: The Diabolos finds easy prey on those who are proud. Paul called them novices because they are easily lifted up with pride and thus will fall into the condemnation of the Diabolos. Thus only by continuing to walk humbly before THE FATHER, will one receive grace to resist the Diabolos. 1Ti 3:6 Not a novice, lest being lifted up with pride he fall into the condemnation of the devil. That is the reason why My FATHER will not permit the spirit of pride to continue to manifest in any of His called ones. Therefore, He will permit the Diabolos to humiliate them and at the same time permit them to undergo the tribulations and persecutions to break their pride, ego and self-righteousness so that He may restore their broken and contrite hearts completely, and make them steadfast in their hope of the gospel, and strengthen them in their faith in

135-5-he-will-flee-from-you.title: 5) He will Flee from You
135-5-he-will-flee-from-you.excerpt: Jas 4:7 Submit yourselves therefore to THE ELOHIM. Resist the Diabolos, and he will flee from you. When someone minds the things of the spirit and not the things of the transient world and stop standing in his self-righteousness but submit to the higher authorities in humility as submitting to the chastening of THE FATHER even if they are unjust, the Diabolos and all of his demons will flee from him. Why is this so? It is because THE FATHER will deliver such a person from the hand of all his enemies. He will come to his cry and punish all that oppressed him in anger. Hell and death will flee from such a person for THE FATHER will hear his cry and come down with His angels to avenge him from his persecutors. According to his righteousness and cleanliness of his hands will THE FATHER compensate him because he

Chapter 4 
Be Converted (part 2)
136-chapter-4-be-converted-p2.excerpt: To be converted is to turn one's course of thinking seeing from the perspective of the Protocol of heaven like the centurion in Luke 7:1-10 who was spiritually minded and had great faith in the ordained authority. Usually, our submission to authority is based on whether we respect the one who has the authority over us or whether he is righteous and just. But to those who are converted, they will obey the one who has the authority ordained by THE FATHER, and will submit to them even if they are unrighteous and unjust. Therefore, we need to be converted and spiritually minded to sanctify THE FATHER and not to be self-righteous. 138-vision-of-a-heart-made-of-diamond.title: Vision of a Heart Made Of Diamond
138-vision-of-a-heart-made-of-diamond.excerpt: David: One day while I was praying with a seer pleading to THE FATHER to heal my broken heart because of the reproaches He put me through all those years, he saw a vision of THE FATHER'S hand coming down from heaven towards my heart. Expecting to be healed by His touch, I was horrified when he told me that he saw THE FATHER grabbed my heart with His hand and crushed it, and threw it hard on the floor which shattered into many pieces like broken glasses. Upon hearing that, I was in despair. Next, he told me that THE FATHER gathered the broken pieces with His hand and turned them into a heart made of diamond. I was perplexed when I heard that. As I meditated on this vision, I heard the voice of THE HOLY SPIRIT speaking these words: "When your FATHER has finished breaking you, He

The Race of the Fittest
139-chapter-6-the-race-of-the-fittest.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, teach us the protocol so that we can finish the Race of faith to enter into THE FATHER'S rest?

140-1-know-what-you-are-running-for.title: 1) Know What You Are Running For
140-1-know-what-you-are-running-for.excerpt: JESUS: Before one runs in a race, he must know what the prize that he is running for and whether it is worth the sacrifice. You are running for the prize of eternal life, the prize of the crown of righteousness, and the prize of winning the title of a Christ so as to obtain the power of His resurrection through the fellowship of His sufferings, being made conformable unto His death. If you are running for other things, you are in the wrong race and you are running in vain. Finishing to a finish line in each race is a means to an end. If you do not persevere to reach the ultimate finishing line, you have missed the mark. 1 Ti 6:12 Fight the good fight of faith, lay hold on eternal life, whereunto thou art also called, and hast professed a good profession before many witnesses. 2

This is the spirit of Antichrist. 1 Th 2:1 For yourselves, brethren, know our entrance in unto you, that it was not in vain: 1 Th 2:2 But even after that we had suffered before, and were shamefully entreated, as ye know, at Philippi, we were bold in our ELOHIM to speak unto you the gospel of ELOHIM with much contention (G73 "agon"). You shall be tested in this area and if you look back, you will not be able to finish the race to enter into My Kingdom. I am come to send fiery trial to those We have chosen on the earth; and what will I, if it be already kindled? There is a baptism unto My death for My elect; and how am I straitened till it be accomplished! Suppose ye that I am come to give peace on earth? I tell you, Nay; but rather division: For from henceforth there shall be five in one house divided, three against two, and two against three. The father shall be divided against the son, and the son against the father; the

Empty Yourself
144-chapter-7-empty-yourself.excerpt: David: LORD JESUS, teach me the secret of how I can empty myself. Shekinaih: I see a dead person lying on a coffin. JESUS: The secret to empty oneself is to : Deny your flesh from all your fleshly desires and acts. Empty your soul from all your carnality in thoughts and your fleshly emotion(s) which are controlled by the prince of the air. Empty your spirit from being entangled with the carnality of your mind and from being taken captive by your fleshly emotions which are controlled by the Devil. You need to crucify your old man on the cross following My footsteps. For he that is dead is freed from sin. 149-what-is-the-meaning-of-be-circumcise.title: What Is The Meaning of, "Be Circumcised"?
149-what-is-the-meaning-of-be-circumcise.excerpt: To be circumcised, one needs to empty his/her carnality ways of seeing, judging and doing things. One needs to come to an end of himself/herself and ask for Mine counsel or wisdom in seeing, assessing, and doing things from My perspective. Nevertheless, one must avail himself/herself for the circumcision of his/her heart through denying himself/herself, taking up his/her cross and be crucified by Me on that cross, and put on My nature which is to be connected with My FATHER through abiding in My words and thereby abiding in us and will be transformed by us and behold Our likeness in that being like-minded with us; and thereby being inaugurated by us through Our representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David to be made ready to assume as Our archangels fully arrayed with their respective weapons to fulfil their high standing duties. But those who think they are wise and boast

Rom 2:29 But he is a Jew, which is one inwardly; and circumcision is that of the heart, in the spirit, and not in the letter; whose praise is not of men, but of THE ELOHIM. 152-1-cut-off-from-his-people.title: 1) Cut off from His People

He/she shall not be allowed to enter into Heavenly Mount Zion to be part of the Heavenly Jerusalem as My Bride. 006-12-50-commandments-for-the-last-days.title: 50 COMMANDMENTS FOR THE LAST DAYS' ARMY
006-12-50-commandments-for-the-last-days.excerpt: 50 COMMANDMENTS FOR THE LAST DAYS' ARMY To obey The Protocol of Heaven. To submit to the authority above them unless the above authority disobey the instructions of THE FATHER through Shekinaih. To respect, obey, honor, and evil speak not against the authority above them that honors the Protocol of Heaven. To bridle the tongue, lest they shall transgress against the Almighty in their complaining and murmuring against us. To profane not against our names and our representatives in Shekinaih and Aaron K David. To envy not the gifting of others, for each vessel in my army are uniquely created to fulfill a specific role in my last days' army. Shalom, all must keep within their line of authority and follow suit the order given to them by the people above them with a genuine and sincere heart without hypocrisy. 006-13-shekinaih-sitting-on-a-throne.excerpt: SHEKINAIH SITTING ON A THRONE SHEKINAIH: I see myself wearing a golden Chinese Empress' robe sitting on a Golden Throne in the three realms with the words "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" written on my forehead. Sometime, the words "THE EHYEH" or "THE YAHWEH" or "THE ELOHIM" or "THE EL" or "THE SHADDAI" or "THE ADONAI" inter- changed with "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" on my forehead. The names "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE El" are back to back like the two sides of a coin. JESUS: David, for most of the time, you shall manifest our name, "THE EL", in mercy and gentleness while Shekinaih shall manifest our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", in severity. Both of you are the sword, the voice, and the glory of our Excellency who shall come in the Excellency of THE YAHWEH. Through our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", Shekinaih will release my decree, and you, who most of the time bears my name, "THE EL", will come upon every one that is proud and lofty, and every one that is lifted up; and they shall be brought low. All the kings and nobles, all the wealthy that are lifted up and the haughty shall also be brought low together with the demons which they worshipped in every nation. All will be terrified when we arise to shake terribly the earth through both of you. 006-16-in-the-excellency-of-the-name-of-.excerpt: IN THE EXCELLENCY OF THE NAME OF THE YAHWEH DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how shall Shekinaih and I come in your Excellency? THE FATHER: Shekinaih shall represent THE HOLY SPIRIT in birthing you out prophetically as my SON'S reincarnation. Together, you shall gather the remnants of Spiritual Israel. Both of you shall be established and will shepherd them in the Excellency of my name. In that day, my sheep shall remain with both of you whom we will magnify throughout the world. When the Anti-Christ (symbolized by the King of Assyria) attacks my household, we shall raise seven angels/apostles (you being the seventh) to assist you to declare judgments on the cities of the Anti-Christ and his armies. JESUS: Both of you are our voice, our spokesman, our twomouth sword; one tongue in releasing my decree, manifesting our name "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", and the other tongue manifesting our name "THE EL" in the co-execution of the decree. Shekinaih is indeed the incarnation of my FATHER and the reincarnation of THE HOLY SPIRIT who first incarnated in Mary, my physical mother; and you, David, are indeed my reincarnation. 006-18-a-giant-saber.title: A GIANT SABER
006-18-a-giant-saber.excerpt: A GIANT SABER JESUS: David, are you quickened and energized by this revelation? Do you have an inner witness that you want to share with Shekinaih? DAVID: Yes, I am very enlightened. Shekinaih, a few years ago, I was invited by a sister in Christ to a prayer tower in India. I told the secretary of the founder of the prayer tower that THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST had instructed me to have overnight prayer in the tower for three consecutive nights. She rejected my request in unbelief and told me that ever since the prayer tower was opened, no stranger had been given permission to have private overnight prayer there. I told her to inform the founder and promised her that I will not continue with my endeavor if the founder said no to my request.
